component.name: Glaciem Miner
component.summary: CPU-only Lattice miner with a built-in Glaciem wallet

description.p: Glaciem Miner is a desktop app that mines the Glaciem cryptocurrency using its native Lattice proof-of-work — a CPU-only, integer, memory- latency-bound algorithm that rewards wide high-IPC CPU cores and collapses GPU and ASIC occupancy by design.
A full Glaciem wallet is embedded directly in the app: generate a seed, sync with the network, mine to your own address, and send & receive — no separate wallet daemon, no config files.
Glaciem is a Monero fork with privacy (RingCT, ring signatures, stealth addresses) inherited unchanged. Mainnet launched May 20, 2026 as a true fair launch, with no premine and no presale.
Linux wallet display fix and a per-platform thread spinner.

ul.li: Linux wallet now correctly displays "GLAC" when sending (was "RME" in v1.1.11 due to a stale build artifact).
New CPU threads picker in Settings — choose how many cores the miner uses, with one-click Recommended (N/2) and All (N) presets.
